sentences.text: I'm not in my office at the moment, so I've.

Did I send us the wrong.
I was actually gonna email you and say the same thing.
I was like, I got nothing.
Sweet did I send it to the wrong that's.
You know, it's funny because somebody else in my company emailed me today but meant to email someone named Chris.
And so I was copied on it, and I was like I shouldn't be on this thread.
I'm getting what I shouldn't and not what I should.
It is to you and Melissa the correct emails.

So I'm glad we hopped on, because.

Yeah, I I just assumed your stuff was coming where it needs.

So we literally just last week we we rebranded.

yeah, I'd say, Okay, I'm glad we hopped on.

I know that the the days are busy, so I didn't.

for the sake of for the sake of an update.

So same same everything, you know, nothing's changed for you but Google business pro has kinda taken us to where it was gonna go.
